INVESTMENT SERVICES ACT (PROVISION OF
INVESTMENT SERVICES AND ACTIVITIES BY
THIRD- COUNTRY FIRMS)

[ L.S.370.43

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 370.43
REGOLAMENTI DWAR INVESTMENT SERVICES
ACT (PROVISION OF INVESTMENT SERVICES AND
ACTIVITIES BY THIRD- COUNTRY FIRMS))*
3 ta’ Jannar, 2018
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 405 tal-2017, kif emendat bl-Avviżi Legali 21 tal2022, 72 tal-2023 u 155 tal-2025.

*Dawn ir-regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
